# fakturownia-cli

> Agent-first Go CLI for the Fakturownia API, with a generated installable skill bundle at `skills/fakturownia`.

## Canonical Sources

- README: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/README.md
- CLI contract registry: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/internal/spec/specs.go
- Root command wiring: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/internal/spec/root.go
- Output behavior: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/tree/master/internal/output

## Skill Bundle

- Root skill: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/skills/fakturownia/SKILL.md
- Bundle-local index: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/skills/fakturownia/references/skills-index.md
- Recipes index: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/skills/fakturownia/recipes/index.md
- Repo browsing index: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/docs/skills.md
- Bundle manifest: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/skills/fakturownia/manifest.json
- Bundle changelog: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/skills/fakturownia/CHANGELOG.md

## Release And Install

- Latest release: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/releases/latest
- Release tags: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/tags
- Install script: https://github.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/blob/master/install.sh
- Raw install script: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sixers/fakturownia-cli/master/install.sh

## Notes For Agents

- Prefer the generated bundle at `skills/fakturownia` for agent use.
- Use the Go source tree to verify stable CLI contracts and output behavior.
- The default branch for this repository is `master`.
